sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ عُمَرُ افْتِتَاحَ مَشْرُوعِهِ الْخَاصِّ فِي مَدِينَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Omar je odlučio otvoriti vlastiti projekat u svom gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Omar decided to open his own project in his city.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ لِتَطْوِيرِ فِكْرَتِهِ الْمُبْتَكَرَةِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan naporno radi na razvoju svoje inovativne ideje.
sentences.translationEn: He works hard to develop his innovative idea every day.

sentences.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ رَائِدَ أَعْمَالٍ نَاجِحًا فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Želi postati uspješan poduzetnik u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: He wants to become a successful entrepreneur in the future.
